Advice Surgeries

  • Tweet

Martin Vickers holds regular advice surgeries across the constituency. To book an appointment, please email [email protected] or call 01469 572777

Surgeries are held at the following locations:

Brigg, Barton, Waltham and Immingham.

NB: Surgeries are by appointment only and may be subject to change at short notice.

 

Martin Vickers Conservative candidate for Brigg and Immingham
